title: Duck+
description: A Vanilla Based Survival / PvP Pack.
body:
## ![Duck+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba495fcf29a4bc15816c9817150249b7382c5dd3.png)First Release of **Duck+**
## 

## **Utility**
### Particles
> No Explosion Particles
> 
> Smaller Totem Particles

Low Fire

No Pumpkin Blur

Ore Highlihts

Less obstructive rain

## **PvP**

### Models
> 3D First Person End Crystal
>
> Real Suspicious Stew

Duck Enderpearls & Golden Apples

Old Enchantment Glint

## **Credits**

Made by LSE0 _A.K.A MechonatKvissa_

Cool Ideas From Wolfiwolf135
